headline: Amazon Hit by Federal Labour Investigation: Widespread Wage Theft and Safety Violations across 23 Distribution Hubs.
summary: The US Department of Labor opens a formal judicial investigation into Amazon.com Inc. following structural evidence of illegal overtime practices and unreported warehouse safety violations.

summary:

headline: Why local networks are the future of aid in Africa
summary: For decades, the international humanitarian system has operated on an assumption inherited from the 20th century: Crises are temporary disruptions; states remain broadly functional; and outside organizations can intervene, stabilize conditions, and withdraw.
